commands.repair_reason: The patch is a normal review candidate rather than an automated repair: the remaining blockers are contributor real-behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the fail-closed upgrade behavior.; Cleared: The diff only touches outbound TypeScript logic, tests, and docs, with no dependency, workflow, secret-handling, or supply-chain changes. commands.review_summary:
The branch adds shared outbound account selection after channel resolution, wires it into runMessageAction, updates routing/message docs, and adds focused resolver/plugin-dispatch tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main leaves omitted accountId unresolved in runMessageAction, and WhatsApp then falls through to default-account resolution even when the reported config has disabled default and one enabled named account.
commands.review_followup: The patch is a normal review candidate rather than an automated repair: the remaining blockers are contributor real-behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the fail-closed upgrade behavior.
